title: Slow-cooker carrot and coriander soup
subtitle: Carrots blended with ground coriander and fresh ginger
excerpt: Carrots, onion, and ginger slow-cooked in vegetable stock for six hours, then blended smooth with ground coriander. A classic British soup that the slow cooker improves by concentrating the natural sweetness of the carrots over the long cook.
sourceNotes: Carrot and coriander soup became the most popular soup in British supermarkets and home kitchens from the 1990s onwards. It is a reliable combination: the sweetness of carrot, the warmth of coriander, and ginger's slight heat. The slow cooker concentrates the carrot's sweetness in a way that a quick 20-minute stovetop version cannot.

recipe.freezeNotes: Freezes well for up to 3 months.
recipe.makeAheadNotes: Make ahead and refrigerate. Reheat gently, adding a little extra stock if it has thickened.

content.text: Bloom the ground coriander in oil before adding it. One minute in a hot pan with the onion transforms the raw spice flavour into something warm and rounded. Ground coriander added cold directly to the slow cooker produces a flat, slightly dusty result.

Heat the {{vegetable-oil}} in a small pan. Fry the {{onion}} for 3 minutes. Add the {{coriander-ground}} and {{cumin-ground}} and stir for 30 seconds until fragrant. Transfer to the slow cooker. Add the {{carrot}}, {{garlic}}, {{ginger-root}}, {{stock-vegetable}}, {{sea-salt-fine}}, and {{black-pepper}}. Cook on low for 6 hours, until the carrot is completely soft. Blend smooth using a stick blender. Add a squeeze of {{lemon}} juice to taste if using. Taste and adjust seasoning.

items.symptom: Soup very sweet and lacking depth
items.cause: Carrots concentrated over 6 hours become very sweet
items.fix: A squeeze of lemon juice cuts through the sweetness immediately. The cumin also adds a savoury note — increase to 1 teaspoon next time
Blend without returning the liquid and add back gradually until the right consistency is reached

items.cause: Old ground coriander or insufficient blooming
items.fix: Replace any ground coriander more than a year old. Always bloom it in oil for at least 30 seconds before adding to the slow cooker

content.text: Carrot and coriander is Britain's most recognisable soup. The slow cooker version is the best home cook version because the long cook concentrates the carrot's flavour. Make a large batch and freeze it — it keeps for three months and reheats in minutes. Serve with crusty bread and a swirl of yoghurt.
